user.title: Kroki Server
user.description: Configure the connection to a Kroki diagram server.

data_description.server_url: The full URL of the Kroki server, including protocol and port.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Kroki Server
reconfigure.description: Change the Kroki server URL for this entry.

data_description.server_url: The new URL of the Kroki server.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Kroki server. Please check the URL and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Kroki server is already configured.

user.title: Add Diagram
user.description: Configure a new Kroki diagram entity.

data_description.name: Display name for this diagram entity (e.g. 'Network Overview').
data_description.diagram_type: The Kroki diagram type to use for rendering.
data_description.diagram_source: Diagram source code or Jinja2 template. Templates are re-rendered automatically when referenced entity states change.
data_description.output_format: Image format for this diagram. 'Server Default' inherits the format configured on the server entry.

reconfigure.title: Edit Diagram
reconfigure.description: Update the configuration for this diagram entity.

data_description.name: Display name for this diagram entity.
data_description.diagram_type: The Kroki diagram type to use for rendering.
data_description.diagram_source: Diagram source code or Jinja2 template.
data_description.output_format: Image format for this diagram. 'Server Default' inherits the format configured on the server entry.

init.title: Kroki Options
init.description: Configure options for this Kroki server.

data_description.default_output_format: Default image format for new diagrams (SVG or PNG).
data_description.cache_max_size: Maximum number of rendered images to keep in the cache (1-500).

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Reload Kroki image entities from YAML configuration.

force_render.name: Force Render
force_render.description: Forces an immediate re-render of one or more Kroki diagram entities, bypassing the hash-based dedup and disk cache.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: One or more Kroki diagram image entities to force-render.
